scripts.start: for f in $(find src -name '*.ts' | sort); do echo "\n--- $f ---"; node --expose-gc "$f"; done
scripts.start:object: for f in src/object/*.ts; do echo "\n--- $f ---"; node --expose-gc "$f"; done
scripts.start:array: for f in src/array/*.ts; do echo "\n--- $f ---"; node --expose-gc "$f"; done
scripts.start:map-set: for f in src/map-set/*.ts; do echo "\n--- $f ---"; node --expose-gc "$f"; done
scripts.start:set: for f in src/set/*.ts; do echo "\n--- $f ---"; node --expose-gc "$f"; done
scripts.start:iteration: for f in src/iteration/*.ts; do echo "\n--- $f ---"; node --expose-gc "$f"; done
scripts.start:function: for f in src/function/*.ts; do echo "\n--- $f ---"; node --expose-gc "$f"; done
